probes.name: theme-vocabulary-hydrated
probes.description: The in-memory token vocabulary is populated. Failure means data/token-vocabulary.json failed to load at boot.

probes.name: theme-platform-presets-seeded
probes.description: The 6 platform presets from data/preset-catalog.json are present in theme_presets with tenant_id NULL.

probes.name: theme-css-regen-worker-healthy
probes.description: The theme queue has at least one worker attached AND no stalled RegenerateRenderedCssJob in the last 5min. Non-critical because stale CSS renders fine; the alert surfaces the backlog.

probes.name: theme-preview-render-available
probes.description: PreviewPresetJob's headless browser (Puppeteer / Chromium) is reachable. Non-critical because preset thumbnails degrade to color-swatch placeholders when unavailable.

probes.name: theme-active-theme-count
probes.description: Sanity check — no tenant has more than one active Theme per mode (the partial unique index enforces this at the DB layer; this probe surfaces DB-layer bugs).
